query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, up.territories, up.assignedBusinessLines
FROM users u
INNER JOIN userProfiles up ON up.userId = u.id
WHERE JSON_CONTAINS(up.assignedBusinessLines, '"Portable Air"')
ORDER BY u.name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute
